commands.command: Read-only live receipt, identity path, validator, rollback, and retry-classification audit

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: T020失敗は資格固有データではなく、materializerとvalidatorのstable parent identity不一致、およびserver-owned deterministic failureをretryableへ分類する汎用実装欠陥である。ID/source/scope検証とrollbackを弱めず、parent単位で二者review consensusを固定・再利用する必要がある。
evidence: Attempt 1 stored two distinct gpt-5.5/high target approvals with the same four spans.
Materializer prioritizes source canonical_question_key/source_question_id while validator reconstructed only from patch identity aliases.
Deterministic server commit failure was marked retryable and launched two additional reviews.
Both attempts rolled back without candidate changes.
missing_evidence: Candidate retry with exactly two cumulative reviews and reused consensus.
goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: 共通identity・review reuse・retry boundaryを一つの修正packageで直すことを承認した。
